key.name: position
key.description: gettext("Position of the indicator in the panel.")

key.name: offset
key.description: gettext("Index offset of the indicator in the panel box.")

key.name: update-interval
key.description: gettext("Interval in milliseconds for updating the playback position.")

key.name: only-show-translation
key.description: gettext("If enabled, only show the translation part of the lyrics (text after two consecutive spaces).")

key.name: lyric-advance-ms
key.description: gettext("Advance lyric display by this many milliseconds. Positive values show lyrics earlier, negative values delay them.")

key.name: lyric-files
key.description: gettext("Array of JSON configuration file paths, each containing mappings from song titles to lyric file paths.")
